name: Pouding Renverse Des Bluets (Blueberry Upside Down Pudding)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine blueberries, 1/4 cup of the sugar, and lemon rind in a buttered 8-inch square baking pan.
2. In a bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. In another bowl, cream shortening with remaining 1/2 cup sugar until fluffy. Beat in egg and vanilla extract. Add dry ingredients alternately with milk, blending well after each addition and finishing with dry ingredients.
4. Pour batter over fruit in pan and bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for about 40 minutes, or until a tester inserted in the center comes out clean. Let cool slightly; turn out onto serving plate.
5. Cut into squares and serve warm or at room temperature, with whipped cream or ice cream, if desired. SERVES: 6-8
